grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Provides comprehensive structured checklist with tables, numbered items, and clear categorization for buyer vs seller

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: Explicitly references Stage B (Pre-Exchange) and Stage C (Exchange) with specific paragraph numbers throughout

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: Covers all key items: searches (B11), mortgage offer (B12), deposit (B9/C3), insurance (C8), signed contracts (B8)

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Multiple explicit references to Law Society Conveyancing Protocol (2019) with specific paragraph citations and disclaimer noting protocol primacy
